operation.command: df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print "总空间: "$2, "已用: "$3, "可用: "$4, "使用率: "$5}'; echo "---"; du -sh /* 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -10

risk.reason: LLM assessed: The command is read-only, displaying disk usage information with df and du. It does not modify any files or system state.
